---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a change and explain the operational benefit
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["feature"]
assignees: []
---

## What problem does this solve

Describe the current limitation or pain point.

## Proposed change

Describe the behaviour you want.

## Operational impact

Explain who benefits and what changes in practice.

## Risks or trade-offs

List any likely downsides or compatibility concerns.

## Root-cause notes

If this request comes from a bug or design issue, record that here.
